validation_summary.evidence: python -m py_compile exits 0 (~0.1s); python -m unittest skills.development-harness.scripts.tests.test_harness_state_docs -v passes 5/5 (0.002s); python -m unittest discover skills/development-harness/scripts/tests passes 215/215 (33.5s, up from 210 -- 5 new cases for unit_042)

checkpoint.summary: unit_042 complete. Both /harness-state docs (skills/development-harness/commands/state.md + templates/workspace-commands/harness-state.md) updated to render three new sections in the output report: Fleet & Batch (from state.execution.fleet, mirroring checkpoint-template.md's Batch columns so consumers cross-reference), Orphans (from sync_harness.py -- the three divergence categories orphan_worktree, stale_fleet_entry, orphan_branch, with explicit 'No orphans detected.' empty render), and Batch Timings (from .harness/logs/<batch_id>/ with the exact one-line format 'Batch <batch_id>: dispatched HH:MM:SS, merged HH:MM:SS, total Ns', with explicit 'Batch timings: unavailable' fallback and explicit ban on git-timestamp inference). New Honesty Rules pin the never-omit behavior for Orphans + Batch Timings -- absence is a reported fact. New test_harness_state_docs.py module with 5 cases locks the contract: Fleet & Batch heading + fleet.* references; Orphans heading + sync_harness.py mention + all three divergence categories + empty-case render; Batch Timings heading + exact format string + fallback render; .harness/logs/ directory reference; git-timestamp inference ban. Suite 210 -> 215.
checkpoint.next_action: Complete unit_043 (PHASE_010): implement log-directory creation logic in dispatch_batch.py (creates .harness/logs/<batch_id>/batch.json at dispatch time with the full batch plan + overlap analysis) and merge_batch.py (writes merge.log with the merge output, validation.log with post-merge validation output). Sub-agent <unit_id>.md summaries are written by sub-agents per the harness-unit contract -- no orchestrator code needed there, but confirm the path. Logs must be harness-owned and gitignored -- add .harness/logs/ to .gitignore if not present. Wrap all log writes in try/except so merge is not blocked by log-dir issues. Validation: new test_batch_logs.py module asserting dispatch+merge produce the expected artifacts in a temp-dir fixture.
